title: The Queens
director: Mauro Bolognini, Mario Monicelli, Antonio Pietrangeli
writer: Ruggero Maccari, Luigi Magni, Suso Cecchi D'Amico
actors: Monica Vitti, Enrico Maria Salerno, Claudia Cardinale
plot: Four unrelated short comedies by four different directors. "Queen Sabina" chronicles the sexual misadventures of a teenage girl on the road home. "Queen Armenia" centers on a self-serving opportunistic gypsy babysitter who uses he...
